privileged_info_summary: The task 'shrinkwrap_decal_application@1' involves applying a Shrinkwrap modifier to a WarningLabel object to conform it to an IndustrialPipe surface in Blender. The scene uses synthetic data: a cylinder (radius 1.0m, depth 4.0m) named IndustrialPipe and a plane (0.6m x 0.6m) named WarningLabel, generated programmatically in setup_task.sh. The modifier's offset must be constrained between 0.005m (5mm) and 0.02m (2cm) to prevent z-fighting while keeping the label conforming to the curved surface. The task requires saving the result to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/pipe_decal.blend without applying the modifier, maintaining it for non-destructive editing.
